top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Extend Gains on Tech, Yen Strengthens: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Asian stocks gained as investors piled back into semiconductor stocks on renewed optimism over AI-driven demand. The yen strengthened.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: What’s Driving SK Hynix’ Billion-Dollar ADR Listing
top_signals.summary: SK Hynix Inc. raised $26.5 billion in its American depositary share offering, the largest ever US first-time share sale by a foreign company. Futurum Semiconductors, Supply Chain & Emerging Tech Research Director Brendan Burke shares his insights. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: China cools on overseas publication of scientific research - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: China cools on overseas publication of scientific research  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Reiwa Shinsengumi head Taro Yamamoto to resign, quit politics
top_signals.summary: The opposition party will change its name and hold a leadership election on July 31.

top_signals.title: Study values GBM’s Ontario graphite mine restart at $183M
top_signals.summary: GBM’s Kearney graphite mine restart in Ontario gets a $183M valuation, highlighting strong returns and Canada’s critical minerals push.
